prioritize: Low overlap with current CRA and meta-skills

candidates.name: repo-researcher
candidates.primary_trigger: Need to understand an unfamiliar repository or toolchain before implementing or reviewing.
candidates.notes: Complements evidence-collector by focusing on repo structure rather than incident evidence.

candidates.name: research-synthesizer
candidates.primary_trigger: Need to combine multiple docs, repos, or sources into a decision memo.
candidates.notes: Distinct from lesson-curator because it synthesizes live research rather than preserving durable lessons.

candidates.name: research-critique
candidates.primary_trigger: Need to challenge hype, contradictions, or weak evidence in a research set.
candidates.notes: Must not duplicate reality-checker; it focuses on source corpus quality instead of runtime diagnosis.

candidates.name: implementation-planner
candidates.primary_trigger: Need to convert intent into a concrete implementation plan with interfaces, defaults, and tests.
candidates.notes: Pairs well with repo-researcher but stays focused on action, not discovery.

candidates.name: persistent-debugger
candidates.primary_trigger: Need to iterate through a bug using hypotheses, evidence, and proof loops.
candidates.notes: Must defer to evidence-collector for compact artifact gathering and to reality-checker for pivot decisions.

candidates.name: structure-designer
candidates.primary_trigger: Need to improve the structure of a plan, doc, prompt, or architecture note.
candidates.notes: Explicitly prioritizes structure design over visual UI design.

candidates.name: thinking-coach
candidates.primary_trigger: Need sharper reasoning, blind-spot detection, or tradeoff framing.
candidates.notes: Must stay analytical, not therapeutic or motivational.

candidates.name: skill-refiner
candidates.primary_trigger: Need to update existing skills for cleaner triggers, less fluff, better packaging, or tighter deliverables.
candidates.notes: Complements skill-creator by targeting refinement of existing skills rather than greenfield creation.
